The Hoodie Line

Engineered comfort meets street-ready design. Scroll to explore.

VexaDrop
Hoodie Pro
Coming Soon

Material Science

Premium Fabric

340gsm heavyweight French terry. Triple-brushed interior for a cloud-like feel against skin. Pre-shrunk and enzyme-washed for a broken-in softness from day one.

OEKO-TEX® Certified
Colour Technology

Zero-Fade Dye

Reactive dye process that bonds colour at a molecular level. 50+ washes and the midnight obsidian stays as deep as day one. No cracking, no fading, no compromise.

Lab Tested 50+ Cycles
Fit Engineering

AI-Fit Technology

Body-mapped sizing powered by our fit algorithm. Dropped shoulders, tapered torso, and ribbed cuffs designed using 10,000+ body-scan data points for universal flattery.

Unisex · XS–3XL
Details

Built Different

YKK® zips. Flat-locked seams. Hidden interior pocket for your essentials. Embossed VexaDrop badge on left cuff. This isn't merch — it's a statement.

Limited First Run
